name: phase2-config-verification
title: [Phase 2 · 06] Config Migration — Regression and Verification
description: Phase 2 收口任务：补齐迁移、merge、设置页写回与错误路径验证。
creator: xuhaochen
notes: 2026-04-23 收口：三类阶段级断言全部落地为显式测试：(1) TOML-first 启动——cli/src/core/__tests__/initializer.toml-first.test.ts (5 用例)；(2) project.toml 影响运行时——cli/src/config/__tests__/resolver.effective-merge.test.ts (6 用例) + main-chain.resolved-config.test.ts (3 用例)；(3) user 层 [agent]/[modes]/[features] round-trip——field-mapping.test.ts 从 7 扩展到 17 用例。pnpm -C cli typecheck 0 error；vitest run 121 passed / 5 skipped。阶段级 DoD 达成，父任务同步置 completed。
